title: Obscure technical questions For writing research
display_title: Obscure technical questions For writing research
wikitext:
[]: Obscure technical questions - For writing research             Quote Post by Markal » Mon Jan 09, 2017 1:21 am Hey there, everyone. First time on the Evageeks forum, so I'll also say my hellos here. Anyways, I'm working on a piece of fiction for Eva, so I'm in need of everyone's knowledge. I personally haven't watched episodes from the original NGE series for years, so my memory/knowledge are currently spotty. I may therefore have missed some stuff while rehashing. Thus, I have some questions regarding some obscure details that I would very much appreciate assistance with: - Is Unit-02 the only Eva capable of using Type-D (magma diving) equipment? From what I can recall, Unit-00 wasn't capable of doing so, but I'm trying to remember if Unit-01 had a similar inability to use the diving suit. - ANSWERED - Who originally requested/sanctioned/ordered Asuka/Unit-02's transfer from Europe over to Japan? My memory is still a little fuzzy about whether it was SEELE or Gendou or someone else entirely... - If an Eva is resting in its cage, is it actually possible for it to freely move about unaided if the soul inside is motivated to do so? Can it only make certain movements under extreme duress (Such as the movements made by Unit-01)? Or is it strictly dependent upon power/activation status? - ANSWERED Once again, your assistance is very much appreciated. If any other questions come to mind, I'll re-edit and post on this message here.

[]: Re: Obscure technical questions - For writing research             Quote Post by Reichu » Mon Jan 09, 2017 3:40 pm Markal#854129 wrote: If an Eva is resting in its cage, is it actually possible for it to freely move about unaided if the soul inside is motivated to do so? Can it only make certain movements under extreme duress (Such as the movements made by Unit-01)? Or is it strictly dependent upon power/activation status?

[]: Re: Obscure technical questions - For writing research             Quote Post by Markal » Mon Jan 09, 2017 11:42 pm Reichu wrote: Nerv seem to regard it as a possibility against which precautions must be taken, whatever that is worth. As for the D-Type equipment, Eva-01's compatibility isn't even brought up. If she was compatible, Gendo would have immediately ruled out using her anyway. Eva-01's hardware is more advanced than 00's, so 01 using the D-Type could well be possible.

[]: Re: Obscure technical questions - For writing research             Quote Post by Reichu » Tue Jan 10, 2017 11:16 am Markal wrote: Gendou or SEELE who passed authority to have Asuka transferred to Tokyo-3...
